```{r Import libraries}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("../common/load-neoipcr.R")
load_neoipcr(dev_pkg_path = "../../../neoipcr")
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(yaml, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up functions}
#| include: false

# Debug mode: when false (default), suppress warnings from rendered output.
# Warnings still appear in the build log. Pass -P debug:true to enable.
debug_mode <- isTRUE(as.logical(params$debug))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = debug_mode)

source("../common/helpers.R")

# Map factual states to coarse clinical categories for pattern matching.
coarse_state <- function(state) {
  dplyr::case_match(
    state,
    c("zero", "below_q1") ~ "low",
    c("q1_to_q2", "q2_to_q3") ~ "mid",
    "above_q3" ~ "high",
    .default = NA_character_
  )
}

# ── Composable interpretation framework ─────────────────────────
# Assembles interpretation strings from: opening + clause + action.
# Each metric pairing definition lives in sR$outlier$pairing_<name>.

# Determine concordance between triggering metric direction and paired
# metric state. Returns "concordant", "discordant", "within_iqr",
# or "no_quartiles".
classify_concordance <- function(metric_state, paired_state, above_is_concerning) {
  if (is.na(paired_state) || paired_state == "no_benchmark")
    return("no_quartiles")
  paired_coarse <- coarse_state(paired_state)
  if (is.na(paired_coarse)) return("no_quartiles")
  if (paired_coarse == "mid") return("within_iqr")

  # Determine if paired direction is clinically consistent with trigger
  metric_coarse <- coarse_state(metric_state)
  if (above_is_concerning) {
    # high trigger + high paired = concordant (both concerning)
    # high trigger + low paired = discordant
    # low trigger + low paired = concordant (both favorable)
    # low trigger + high paired = discordant
    same_direction <- metric_coarse == paired_coarse
  } else {
    # Inverted for protective factors (not currently used, but future-proof)
    same_direction <- metric_coarse != paired_coarse
  }
  if (same_direction) "concordant" else "discordant"
}

# Select the cross-reference clause template and fill placeholders.
select_clause <- function(concordance, paired_coarse, pairing, sR) {
  templates <- sR$outlier$composed
  clause_template <- switch(concordance,
    concordant = if (paired_coarse == "high")
      templates$clause_concordant_high else templates$clause_concordant_low,
    discordant = if (paired_coarse == "high")
      templates$clause_discordant_high else templates$clause_discordant_low,
    within_iqr = templates$clause_within_iqr,
    no_quartiles = templates$clause_no_quartiles,
    ""
  )
  if (is.null(clause_template) || !nzchar(clause_template)) return("")
  as.character(glue::glue(clause_template,
    paired_label = pairing$paired_label %||% "",
    paired_label_sc = pairing$paired_label_sc %||%
      tools::toTitleCase(pairing$paired_label %||% ""),
    paired_ref = pairing$paired_ref %||% "",
    .open = "{", .close = "}"))
}

# Select the action string based on direction and concordance.
select_action <- function(metric_coarse, concordance, pairing) {
  if (metric_coarse == "high") {
    if (concordance == "discordant")
      pairing$action_elevated_narrowed %||% pairing$action_elevated
    else
      pairing$action_elevated
  } else {
    if (concordance == "discordant")
      pairing$action_low_narrowed %||% pairing$action_low
    else
      pairing$action_low
  }
}

# Assemble a complete interpretation string from parts.
# Returns NULL if the metric is not an outlier or pairing is NULL.
compose_interpretation <- function(metric_state, pairing, paired_state, sR) {
  if (is.null(pairing)) return(NULL)
  metric_coarse <- coarse_state(metric_state)
  if (is.na(metric_coarse) || metric_coarse == "mid") return(NULL)

  # Part 1: Opening
  templates <- sR$outlier$composed
  opening_template <- if (metric_coarse == "high")
    templates$opening_above else templates$opening_below
  opening <- as.character(glue::glue(opening_template,
    metric_label = pairing$metric_label, .open = "{", .close = "}"))

  # Part 2: Clause (empty for unpaired metrics)
  clause <- ""
  if (!is.null(pairing$paired_label) && !is.null(paired_state)) {
    concordance <- classify_concordance(
      metric_state, paired_state, pairing$above_is_concerning %||% TRUE)
    paired_coarse <- coarse_state(paired_state)
    clause <- select_clause(concordance, paired_coarse, pairing, sR)
  } else {
    concordance <- "no_quartiles"
  }

  # Part 3: Action
  action <- select_action(metric_coarse, concordance, pairing)
  if (is.null(action)) return(paste0(opening, clause, "."))

  paste0(opening, clause, ". ", action)
}

# Helper: look up an interpretation string, returning it or NULL.
interp <- function(sR, key) {
  text <- sR$outlier[[key]]
  if (!is.null(text)) text else NULL
}

# ── Interpret functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Each examines the combined state profile and returns 0-N strings.
# All accept an optional registry parameter for cross-table context.

interpret_antibiotic_rates <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(c(a = "a", w = "w", r = "r"), \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (length(cs) == 0) return(character(0))
  parts <- character(0)
  if (length(cs) == 3 && all(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_all_above"))
  else if (length(cs) == 3 && all(cs == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_all_below"))
  if (length(cs) >= 2) {
    if (isTRUE(cs["r"] == "high") && all(cs[names(cs) != "r"] != "high"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_reserve_isolated_high"))
    ord <- match(cs, c("low", "mid", "high"))
    if (length(ord) == 3 && !is.unsorted(ord) && ord[1] < ord[3])
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_gradient_ascending"))
    if (length(ord) == 3 && !is.unsorted(rev(ord)) && ord[1] > ord[3])
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_gradient_descending"))
  }
  if (any(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_review_resistance"))
  # Direction-aware Watch interpretation
  if (isTRUE(cs["w"] == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_watch_low"))
  if (isTRUE(cs["w"] == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "antibiotic_rate_interpretation_watch_high"))
  unique(Filter(Negate(is.null), parts))
}

interpret_ventilatory_support <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(c(niv = "niv", inv = "inv"), \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (length(cs) < 2) return(character(0))
  parts <- character(0)
  if (all(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "ventilatory_support_interpretation_all_above"))
  else if (all(cs == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "ventilatory_support_interpretation_all_below"))
  if (cs["inv"] == "high" && cs["niv"] == "low")
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "ventilatory_support_interpretation_inv_high_niv_low"))
  if (cs["niv"] == "high" && cs["inv"] == "low")
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "ventilatory_support_interpretation_niv_high_inv_low"))
  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_severe_infection <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  parts <- character(0)
  dev_ass <- registry$dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table

  # Definition 1: Severe infection (unpaired — directs to components)
  si_state <- state_map[["si"]]
  if (!is.null(si_state)) {
    si_text <- compose_interpretation(
      si_state, sR$outlier$pairing_severe_infection, NULL, sR)
    if (!is.null(si_text)) parts <- c(parts, si_text)
  }

  # Definition 2: Primary sepsis/BSI ↔ device-associated BSI (composite)
  bsi_state <- state_map[["bsi"]]
  if (!is.null(bsi_state) && coarse_state(bsi_state) %in% c("high", "low")) {
    # Composite resolution: check CVC BSI and PVC BSI from Table 2
    paired_state <- NULL
    if (!is.null(dev_ass)) {
      cvc_state <- dev_ass[["cvc"]]
      pvc_state <- dev_ass[["pvc"]]
      if (is.na(cvc_state) || is.na(pvc_state) ||
          cvc_state == "no_benchmark" || pvc_state == "no_benchmark") {
        paired_state <- "no_benchmark"
      } else {
        cvc_c <- coarse_state(cvc_state)
        pvc_c <- coarse_state(pvc_state)
        bsi_c <- coarse_state(bsi_state)
        # Either concordant → concordant
        if ((!is.na(cvc_c) && cvc_c == bsi_c) ||
            (!is.na(pvc_c) && pvc_c == bsi_c)) {
          paired_state <- bsi_state  # concordant
        } else {
          # Both within IQR → discordant (not explained by dev-ass BSI)
          paired_state <- "q1_to_q2"  # maps to "mid" → "within_iqr"
        }
      }
    }
    bsi_text <- compose_interpretation(
      bsi_state, sR$outlier$pairing_bsi, paired_state, sR)
    if (!is.null(bsi_text)) parts <- c(parts, bsi_text)
  }

  # Definition 3: Pneumonia ↔ VAP (primary) + VS util (fallback)
  hap_state <- state_map[["hap"]]
  if (!is.null(hap_state) && coarse_state(hap_state) %in% c("high", "low")) {
    pairing <- sR$outlier$pairing_hap
    vs_dev_state <- if (!is.null(dev_ass)) dev_ass[["vs"]] else NULL
    usage <- registry$usage_density_rate_table
    vs_util_state <- if (!is.null(usage)) usage[["vs"]] else NULL

    if (!is.null(vs_dev_state) && !is.na(vs_dev_state) &&
        vs_dev_state != "no_benchmark") {
      # Primary: VAP has quartiles — use it directly
      simple_pairing <- list(
        metric_label = pairing$metric_label,
        paired_label = pairing$primary_paired_label,
        paired_label_sc = tools::toTitleCase(pairing$primary_paired_label),
        paired_ref = pairing$primary_paired_ref,
        above_is_concerning = pairing$above_is_concerning,
        action_elevated = pairing$action_elevated,
        action_elevated_narrowed = pairing$action_elevated_narrowed,
        action_low = pairing$action_low,
        action_low_narrowed = pairing$action_low_narrowed)
      hap_text <- compose_interpretation(hap_state, simple_pairing, vs_dev_state, sR)
    } else if (!is.null(vs_util_state) && !is.na(vs_util_state) &&
               vs_util_state != "no_benchmark") {
      # Fallback: VAP has no quartiles, use VS utilization with combined clause
      fallback_coarse <- coarse_state(vs_util_state)
      fallback_position <- if (!is.na(fallback_coarse) && fallback_coarse == "high") "above"
        else if (!is.na(fallback_coarse) && fallback_coarse == "low") "below"
        else "within"
      hap_coarse <- coarse_state(hap_state)
      opening_template <- if (hap_coarse == "high")
        sR$outlier$composed$opening_above else sR$outlier$composed$opening_below
      opening <- as.character(glue::glue(opening_template,
        metric_label = pairing$metric_label, .open = "{", .close = "}"))
      clause <- as.character(glue::glue(sR$outlier$composed$clause_fallback,
        primary_paired_label = pairing$primary_paired_label,
        primary_paired_ref = pairing$primary_paired_ref,
        fallback_paired_label_sc = pairing$fallback_paired_label_sc,
        fallback_position = fallback_position,
        fallback_paired_ref = pairing$fallback_paired_ref,
        .open = "{", .close = "}"))
      # Determine concordance for action selection using fallback metric
      concordance <- classify_concordance(
        hap_state, vs_util_state, pairing$above_is_concerning %||% TRUE)
      action <- select_action(hap_coarse, concordance, pairing)
      hap_text <- paste0(opening, clause, ". ", action)
    } else {
      # Both unavailable
      hap_text <- compose_interpretation(hap_state, pairing, NULL, sR)
    }
    if (!is.null(hap_text)) parts <- c(parts, hap_text)
  }

  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_vascular_catheter <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(c(cvc = "cvc", pvc = "pvc"), \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (length(cs) < 2) return(character(0))
  parts <- character(0)
  if (all(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "vascular_catheter_interpretation_both_above"))
  else if (all(cs == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "vascular_catheter_interpretation_both_below"))
  if (cs["pvc"] == "high" && cs["cvc"] == "low")
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "vascular_catheter_interpretation_pvc_high_cvc_low"))
  if (cs["cvc"] == "high" && cs["pvc"] == "low")
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "vascular_catheter_interpretation_cvc_high_pvc_low"))
  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_intestinal_microbiome <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(c(hm = "human_milk", pro = "probiotic"), \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (length(cs) == 0) return(character(0))
  parts <- character(0)
  # Combined patterns (both metrics available)
  if (length(cs) == 2) {
    if (all(cs == "high"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_both_above"))
    else if (all(cs == "low"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_both_below"))
    if (cs["hm"] == "high" && cs["pro"] == "low")
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_hm_high_pro_low"))
    if (cs["hm"] == "low" && cs["pro"] == "high")
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_hm_low_pro_high"))
  }
  # Single-metric direction-aware interpretation
  if (length(parts) == 0) {
    if (isTRUE(cs["hm"] == "low"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_hm_low"))
    if (isTRUE(cs["hm"] == "high"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_hm_high"))
    if (isTRUE(cs["pro"] == "low"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_pro_low"))
    if (isTRUE(cs["pro"] == "high"))
      parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "intestinal_microbiome_interpretation_pro_high"))
  }
  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_nec <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  nec_state <- state_map[["nec"]]
  nec_coarse <- coarse_state(nec_state)
  if (is.na(nec_coarse) || nec_coarse == "mid") return(character(0))

  pairing <- sR$outlier$pairing_nec
  if (is.null(pairing)) return(character(0))
  usage <- registry$usage_density_rate_table

  hm_state <- if (!is.null(usage)) usage[["human_milk"]] else NULL
  pro_state <- if (!is.null(usage)) usage[["probiotic"]] else NULL
  hm_coarse <- if (!is.null(hm_state)) coarse_state(hm_state) else NA
  pro_coarse <- if (!is.null(pro_state)) coarse_state(pro_state) else NA

  # Opening
  templates <- sR$outlier$composed
  opening_template <- if (nec_coarse == "high")
    templates$opening_above else templates$opening_below
  opening <- as.character(glue::glue(opening_template,
    metric_label = pairing$metric_label, .open = "{", .close = "}"))

  # Priority resolution: human milk (primary), then probiotics (secondary)
  # Step 1: Check primary (human milk)
  primary_pairing <- list(
    paired_label = pairing$primary_paired_label,
    paired_label_sc = pairing$primary_paired_label_sc,
    paired_ref = pairing$primary_paired_ref,
    above_is_concerning = pairing$above_is_concerning)

  hm_concordance <- if (!is.null(hm_state))
    classify_concordance(nec_state, hm_state, pairing$above_is_concerning)
  else "no_quartiles"

  if (hm_concordance %in% c("concordant", "discordant")) {
    # Primary explains or contradicts — use it
    clause <- select_clause(hm_concordance, hm_coarse, primary_pairing, sR)
    # Special case: NEC high + HM high = "despite" → narrowed action
    if (nec_coarse == "high" && hm_concordance == "discordant")
      action <- pairing$action_elevated_narrowed
    else
      action <- select_action(nec_coarse, hm_concordance, pairing)
    return(paste0(opening, clause, ". ", action))
  }

  # Step 2: HM is within IQR or no quartiles — check secondary (probiotics)
  if (!is.na(pro_coarse) && pro_coarse != "mid") {
    secondary_pairing <- list(
      paired_label = pairing$secondary_paired_label,
      paired_label_sc = pairing$secondary_paired_label_sc,
      paired_ref = pairing$secondary_paired_ref,
      above_is_concerning = pairing$above_is_concerning)
    pro_concordance <- classify_concordance(
      nec_state, pro_state, pairing$above_is_concerning)
    clause_parts <- character(0)
    # Include HM status as context
    if (hm_concordance == "within_iqr") {
      clause_parts <- c(clause_parts,
        select_clause("within_iqr", hm_coarse, primary_pairing, sR))
    } else {
      clause_parts <- c(clause_parts,
        select_clause("no_quartiles", NA, primary_pairing, sR))
    }
    clause_parts <- c(clause_parts,
      select_clause(pro_concordance, pro_coarse, secondary_pairing, sR))
    clause <- paste0(clause_parts, collapse = "")
    # Use secondary action if NEC is elevated and probiotics are concordant (low)
    action <- if (nec_coarse == "high" && pro_concordance == "concordant")
      pairing$action_elevated_secondary %||% pairing$action_elevated
    else
      select_action(nec_coarse, pro_concordance, pairing)
    return(paste0(opening, clause, ". ", action))
  }

  # Step 3: Neither explains — use primary with its concordance
  clause <- select_clause(hm_concordance, hm_coarse, primary_pairing, sR)
  action <- select_action(nec_coarse, hm_concordance, pairing)
  paste0(opening, clause, ". ", action)
}

interpret_kangaroo_care <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- coarse_state(state_map[["kangaroo_care"]])
  if (is.na(cs)) return(character(0))
  if (cs == "low")
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "kangaroo_care_interpretation_low")))
  if (cs == "high")
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "kangaroo_care_interpretation_high")))
  character(0)
}

# Device-associated interpret functions use the composable framework.
# Each device metric gets its own simple pairing with the corresponding
# utilization metric from Table 8.
interpret_dev_ass_vascular_catheter <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  usage <- registry$usage_density_rate_table
  parts <- character(0)
  for (dev in c("cvc", "pvc")) {
    dev_state <- state_map[[dev]]
    if (is.null(dev_state)) next
    pairing <- sR$outlier[[paste0("pairing_dev_ass_", dev)]]
    if (is.null(pairing)) next
    paired_state <- if (!is.null(usage)) usage[[dev]] else NULL
    text <- compose_interpretation(dev_state, pairing, paired_state, sR)
    if (!is.null(text)) parts <- c(parts, text)
  }
  parts
}

interpret_dev_ass_ventilatory_support <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  usage <- registry$usage_density_rate_table
  parts <- character(0)
  for (dev in c("vs", "inv", "niv")) {
    dev_state <- state_map[[dev]]
    if (is.null(dev_state)) next
    pairing <- sR$outlier[[paste0("pairing_dev_ass_", dev)]]
    if (is.null(pairing)) next
    paired_state <- if (!is.null(usage)) usage[[dev]] else NULL
    text <- compose_interpretation(dev_state, pairing, paired_state, sR)
    if (!is.null(text)) parts <- c(parts, text)
  }
  parts
}

interpret_surgery <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  categories <- c("abdominal_surgery", "neurosurgery",
                   "inguinal_hernia_surgery",
                   "cardiac_and_large_vessel_surgery",
                   "lung_pleural_space_thoracic_surgery",
                   "oesophageal_surgery", "other")
  cs <- sapply(categories, \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (sum(cs == "high", na.rm = TRUE) >= 2)
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "surgery_rate_interpretation_multiple_above")))
  character(0)
}

interpret_resistance_test <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(names(state_map), \(m) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]))
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  parts <- character(0)
  if (any(cs == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "resistance_test_interpretation_routine_low"))
  if (any(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "resistance_test_interpretation_routine_high"))
  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_agent_detection_per_inf_type <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  components <- c("bsi", "hap", "nec", "ssi")
  cs <- sapply(components, \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (length(cs) == 0) return(character(0))
  if (all(cs == "low"))
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "agent_detection_per_inf_type_interpretation_all_below")))
  if (all(cs == "high"))
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "agent_detection_per_inf_type_interpretation_all_above")))
  parts <- character(0)
  if (any(cs == "high"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "agent_detection_per_inf_type_interpretation_some_above"))
  if (any(cs == "low"))
    parts <- c(parts, interp(sR, "agent_detection_per_inf_type_interpretation_some_below"))
  Filter(Negate(is.null), parts)
}

interpret_secondary_bsi <- function(state_map, sR, registry = NULL) {
  cs <- sapply(c("nec", "hap", "ssi"), \(m) {
    if (m %in% names(state_map)) coarse_state(state_map[[m]]) else NA
  })
  cs <- cs[!is.na(cs)]
  if (sum(cs == "high", na.rm = TRUE) >= 2)
    return(Filter(Negate(is.null), interp(sR, "secondary_bsi_interpretation_multiple_above")))
  character(0)
}

# Outlier detection configuration - groups of related metrics
outlier_groupings <- list(
  incidence_density_rate_table = list(
    severe_infection = list(
      metrics = c("si", "bsi", "hap"),
      total_metric = "si",
      template_prefix = "severe_infection",
      interpret = interpret_severe_infection
    ),
    nec = list(
      metrics = c("nec"),
      template_prefix = "nec_rate",
      interpret = interpret_nec
    )
  ),
  usage_density_rate_table = list(
    vascular_catheter = list(
      metrics = c("cvc", "pvc"),
      template_prefix = "vascular_catheter",
      interpret = interpret_vascular_catheter
    ),
    ventilatory_support = list(
      metrics = c("vs", "niv", "inv"),
      total_metric = "vs",
      template_prefix = "ventilatory_support",
      interpret = interpret_ventilatory_support
    ),
    intestinal_microbiome = list(
      metrics = c("human_milk", "probiotic"),
      template_prefix = "intestinal_microbiome",
      interpret = interpret_intestinal_microbiome
    ),
    antibiotic_rates = list(
      metrics = c("ab", "a", "w", "r"),
      total_metric = "ab",
      template_prefix = "antibiotic_rate",
      interpret = interpret_antibiotic_rates
    ),
    kangaroo_care = list(
      metrics = c("kangaroo_care"),
      template_prefix = "kangaroo_care_rate",
      interpret = interpret_kangaroo_care
    )
  ),
  dev_ass_incidence_density_rate_table = list(
    dev_ass_vascular_catheter = list(
      metrics = c("cvc", "pvc"),
      template_prefix = "dev_ass_vascular_catheter",
      interpret = interpret_dev_ass_vascular_catheter
    ),
    dev_ass_ventilatory_support = list(
      metrics = c("vs", "niv", "inv"),
      total_metric = "vs",
      template_prefix = "dev_ass_ventilatory_support",
      interpret = interpret_dev_ass_ventilatory_support
    )
  ),
  surgery_rate_table = list(
    surgery = list(
      metrics = c("overall", "abdominal_surgery", "neurosurgery",
                   "inguinal_hernia_surgery",
                   "cardiac_and_large_vessel_surgery",
                   "lung_pleural_space_thoracic_surgery",
                   "oesophageal_surgery", "other"),
      total_metric = "overall",
      template_prefix = "surgery_rate",
      interpret = interpret_surgery
    )
  ),
  resistance_test_rate_table = list(
    resistance_test = list(
      metrics = c("3gcr:routine", "3gcr:if_3gcr",
                   "car:routine", "car:if_3gcr", "car:if_3gcr&car",
                   "cor:routine", "mrsa:routine", "vre:routine"),
      template_prefix = "resistance_test",
      interpret = interpret_resistance_test
    )
  ),
  infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_inf_type_table = list(
    agent_detection_per_inf_type = list(
      metrics = c("all", "bsi", "hap", "nec", "ssi"),
      total_metric = "all",
      template_prefix = "agent_detection_per_inf_type",
      interpret = interpret_agent_detection_per_inf_type
    )
  ),
  secondary_bsi_rate_table = list(
    secondary_bsi = list(
      metrics = c("nec", "hap", "ssi"),
      template_prefix = "secondary_bsi",
      interpret = interpret_secondary_bsi
    )
  ),
  infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table = list(),
  abr_infection_rate_table = list()
)

# ── Metric state levels (ordered) ──────────────────────────────────
metric_state_levels <- c("na", "no_benchmark", "zero", "below_q1",
                          "q1_to_q2", "q2_to_q3", "above_q3")

# Classify each metric in a table into a state relative to reference quartiles.
# Returns a named ordered factor (metric_id → state).
classify_metrics <- function(table_data, identifier_col = NULL, combine_cols = NULL) {
  if (is.null(table_data) || nrow(table_data) == 0) {
    return(factor(character(0), levels = metric_state_levels, ordered = TRUE))
  }

  col_names <- names(table_data)
  own_col_name_candidates <- c("pooled_own", "rate_own")
  own_col_name <- own_col_name_candidates[own_col_name_candidates %in% col_names]

  if (!(length(own_col_name) == 1 && all(c("q1_ref", "q3_ref") %in% col_names))) {
    return(factor(character(0), levels = metric_state_levels, ordered = TRUE))
  }

  # Get row identifiers
  if (!is.null(combine_cols) && all(combine_cols %in% names(table_data))) {
    identifiers <- apply(table_data[, combine_cols, drop = FALSE], 1, function(row) {
      paste(row, collapse = ":")
    })
  } else if (!is.null(identifier_col) && identifier_col %in% names(table_data)) {
    identifiers <- as.character(table_data[[identifier_col]])
  } else if (!is.null(rownames(table_data)) && !all(rownames(table_data) == as.character(1:nrow(table_data)))) {
    identifiers <- rownames(table_data)
  } else if (ncol(table_data) > 0) {
    identifiers <- as.character(table_data[[1]])
  } else {
    identifiers <- as.character(1:nrow(table_data))
  }

  own_values <- table_data[[own_col_name]]
  q1 <- table_data$q1_ref
  q3 <- table_data$q3_ref
  q2 <- if ("q2_ref" %in% col_names) table_data$q2_ref else q1 + (q3 - q1) / 2

  # Classify states (check order matters)
  states <- character(length(identifiers))
  for (i in seq_along(identifiers)) {
    own <- own_values[i]
    if (is.na(own)) {
      states[i] <- "na"
    } else if (is.na(q1[i]) || is.na(q3[i])) {
      states[i] <- "no_benchmark"
    } else if (own == 0) {
      states[i] <- "zero"
    } else if (own < q1[i]) {
      states[i] <- "below_q1"
    } else if (!is.na(q2[i]) && own <= q2[i]) {
      states[i] <- "q1_to_q2"
    } else if (own <= q3[i]) {
      states[i] <- "q2_to_q3"
    } else {
      states[i] <- "above_q3"
    }
  }

  stats::setNames(
    factor(states, levels = metric_state_levels, ordered = TRUE),
    tolower(identifiers)
  )
}

# ── Metric state query helpers ────────────────────────────────────

# Get metric IDs in a specific state (or set of states)
get_metrics_in_state <- function(state_map, states) {
  names(state_map[state_map %in% states])
}

# Does this state_map contain any outliers?
has_outliers <- function(state_map) {
  !is.null(state_map) && length(state_map) > 0 &&
    any(state_map %in% c("zero", "below_q1", "above_q3"))
}

# Get outlier metric IDs by direction
get_outliers_below <- function(state_map) {
  get_metrics_in_state(state_map, c("zero", "below_q1"))
}

get_outliers_above <- function(state_map) {
  get_metrics_in_state(state_map, "above_q3")
}

# Compose structured output for a single group.
# Returns NULL (skip), a string (zero early-exit), or a list with:
#   $sections       — list of list(framing, labels) per outlier direction
#   $interpretation — character vector (0-N interpretation sentences)
compose_group_text <- function(group_config, state_map, sR, registry = NULL, table_name = NULL) {
  prefix <- group_config$template_prefix
  metrics <- tolower(group_config$metrics)
  total_metric <- group_config$total_metric
  available <- metrics[metrics %in% names(state_map)]

  if (length(available) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Zero early-exit on total metric (only "zero" — na and no_benchmark
  # are handled by has_outliers() gating the callout entirely)
  if (!is.null(total_metric)) {
    total_metric <- tolower(total_metric)
    if (total_metric %in% names(state_map)) {
      total_state <- as.character(state_map[[total_metric]])
      if (total_state == "zero") {
        key <- paste0(prefix, "_", total_metric, "_zero")
        text <- sR$outlier[[key]]
        if (!is.null(text)) return(text)
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }

  # Determine component metrics (exclude total_metric)
  components <- if (!is.null(total_metric)) {
    available[available != tolower(total_metric)]
  } else {
    available
  }

  # Partition into below/above lists (localized labels)
  below_labels <- character(0)
  above_labels <- character(0)
  for (metric in components) {
    s <- as.character(state_map[[metric]])
    if (s %in% c("zero", "below_q1")) {
      below_labels <- c(below_labels, localize_metric_name(metric, sR, table_name))
    } else if (s == "above_q3") {
      above_labels <- c(above_labels, localize_metric_name(metric, sR, table_name))
    }
  }

  # Build sections (one per non-empty direction)
  sections <- list()
  if (length(below_labels) > 0) {
    sections <- c(sections, list(list(
      framing = sR$outlier$framing_below_q1,
      labels = below_labels
    )))
  }
  if (length(above_labels) > 0) {
    sections <- c(sections, list(list(
      framing = sR$outlier$framing_above_q3,
      labels = above_labels
    )))
  }

  # Interpretation (pass full state_map + registry for cross-table context)
  interpretation <- character(0)
  if (!is.null(group_config$interpret) && is.function(group_config$interpret)) {
    interpretation <- group_config$interpret(state_map, sR, registry)
  }

  if (length(sections) == 0 && length(interpretation) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Generic fallback is handled by format_outlier_text() — it collects labels
  # from groups without specific interpretation and renders one summary at the end.
  list(
    sections = sections,
    interpretation = if (is.character(interpretation)) interpretation else character(0)
  )
}

# Group related outliers using the compose approach.
# state_map: named ordered factor from classify_metrics()
# registry: full metric_registry for cross-table context
group_outliers <- function(state_map, table_name = NULL, sR = NULL, registry = NULL) {
  below <- get_outliers_below(state_map)
  above <- get_outliers_above(state_map)

  grouped <- list(
    grouped_text = list(),
    ungrouped = list(below_q1 = below, above_q3 = above),
    table_name = table_name
  )

  remove_case_insensitive <- function(values, values_to_remove) {
    values[!(tolower(values) %in% tolower(values_to_remove))]
  }

  table_groupings <- outlier_groupings[[table_name]]
  if (!is.null(table_groupings) && !is.null(sR)) {
    for (group_name in names(table_groupings)) {
      group_config <- table_groupings[[group_name]]
      if (!is.null(group_config$classify_args)) next
      group_metrics <- tolower(group_config$metrics)

      composed <- compose_group_text(group_config, state_map, sR, registry, table_name)
      if (!is.null(composed)) {
        grouped$grouped_text[[group_name]] <- composed
        grouped$ungrouped$below_q1 <- remove_case_insensitive(
          grouped$ungrouped$below_q1, group_metrics)
        grouped$ungrouped$above_q3 <- remove_case_insensitive(
          grouped$ungrouped$above_q3, group_metrics)
      }
    }
  }

  return(grouped)
}

# Localize metric name by looking up in string resources.
# When table_name is provided, that table's section is checked first so that
# table-specific labels (e.g., "CVC-associated sepsis/BSI" in Table 2 vs
# plain "CVC" in Table 8) take precedence over the generic glossary entry.
localize_metric_name <- function(metric_id, sR, table_name = NULL) {
  # Check for combined identifiers (e.g., "3gcr:Enterobacteriaceae")
  if (grepl(":", metric_id)) {
    parts <- strsplit(metric_id, ":", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (length(parts) == 2) {
      abr_key <- parts[1]
      condition_key <- parts[2]
      # Localize the resistance mechanism
      localized_abr <- if (!is.null(sR[[abr_key]])) sR[[abr_key]] else abr_key
      # Routine is the default — omit the suffix. Only show the condition
      # for non-routine cases (e.g., "in case of 3GCR").
      if (condition_key == "routine") {
        return(localized_abr)
      }
      # Known testing conditions → parenthesized qualifier
      condition_map <- list(
        if_3gcr = "car_if_3gcr",
        "if_3gcr&car" = "cor_if_3gcr_and_car"
      )
      cond_sR_key <- condition_map[[condition_key]]
      if (!is.null(cond_sR_key) &&
          !is.null(sR[["tbl-resistance-test-rate"]][[cond_sR_key]])) {
        localized_cond <- sR[["tbl-resistance-test-rate"]][[cond_sR_key]]
        return(paste0(localized_abr, " (", localized_cond, ")"))
      }
      # Other composite IDs (e.g., pathogen groups) → colon separator
      return(paste0(localized_abr, ": ", tools::toTitleCase(condition_key)))
    }
  }

  # Explicit metric identifier mappings for identifiers that don't match their
  # display label key directly. Uses sR keys that the table rendering code uses.
  metric_key_map <- list(
    bsi = "primary_sepsis_bsi_sc",
    hap = "pneumonia_sc",
    all = "total",
    a = "access",
    w = "watch",
    r = "reserve"
  )

  # Apply key mapping (e.g., "a" → "access", "bsi" → "primary_sepsis_bsi_sc")
  mapped_key <- metric_key_map[[tolower(metric_id)]]
  lookup_key <- if (!is.null(mapped_key)) mapped_key else tolower(metric_id)

  # When a table_name is provided, check that table's section first so that
  # table-specific overrides take precedence over the generic glossary.
  if (!is.null(table_name) && !is.null(sR[[table_name]][[lookup_key]])) {
    return(sR[[table_name]][[lookup_key]])
  }

  # Try top-level keys
  if (!is.null(sR[[lookup_key]])) {
    return(sR[[lookup_key]])
  }

  # Try table-specific sections (fallback when no table_name provided)
  table_sections <- c(
    "tbl-risk-density-rates",
    "tbl-device-associated-incidence-density-rates",
    "tbl-surgical-procedure-rates",
    "tbl-incidence-density-rates",
    "tbl-infectious-agent-detection-rate",
    "tbl-resistance-test-rate"
  )

  for (section in table_sections) {
    if (!is.null(sR[[section]][[lookup_key]])) {
      return(sR[[section]][[lookup_key]])
    }
  }

  # Fall back to the raw identifier. Warn in debug mode so it renders into
  # the document for diagnosis; silently fall back otherwise.
  if (isTRUE(debug_mode)) {
    rlang::warn(paste0(
      "localize_metric_name: no display label found for metric identifier '",
      metric_id, "'. Using raw identifier as fallback."
    ))
  }
  return(metric_id)
}

# Render a directional section (framing + bullet list of metric labels)
render_outlier_section <- function(framing, labels) {
  bullets <- paste(paste("-", labels), collapse = "\n")
  paste(framing, bullets, sep = "\n\n")
}

# Format outlier text for display in callout boxes.
# Aggregates across all groups within a table: directional sections first,
# then specific interpretations, then generic summary (with metric names) last.
format_outlier_text <- function(outlier_groups, sR) {
  if (is.null(outlier_groups) || length(outlier_groups) == 0) return("")

  table_name <- outlier_groups$table_name
  early_exits <- character(0)
  all_below_labels <- character(0)
  all_above_labels <- character(0)
  specific_interpretations <- character(0)
  generic_labels <- character(0)

  # Collect from grouped items
  if (length(outlier_groups$grouped_text) > 0) {
    for (group_name in names(outlier_groups$grouped_text)) {
      item <- outlier_groups$grouped_text[[group_name]]
      if (is.character(item)) {
        early_exits <- c(early_exits, item)
      } else if (is.list(item)) {
        group_labels <- character(0)
        for (section in item$sections) {
          if (identical(section$framing, sR$outlier$framing_below_q1)) {
            all_below_labels <- c(all_below_labels, section$labels)
          } else {
            all_above_labels <- c(all_above_labels, section$labels)
          }
          group_labels <- c(group_labels, section$labels)
        }
        if (length(item$interpretation) > 0 && any(nzchar(item$interpretation))) {
          specific_interpretations <- c(
            specific_interpretations,
            paste(item$interpretation, collapse = " ")
          )
        } else {
          generic_labels <- c(generic_labels, group_labels)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  # Collect from ungrouped items (always use generic fallback)
  for (direction in c("below_q1", "above_q3")) {
    metrics <- outlier_groups$ungrouped[[direction]]
    if (length(metrics) > 0) {
      labels <- sapply(metrics, localize_metric_name, sR = sR, table_name = table_name, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
      if (direction == "below_q1") {
        all_below_labels <- c(all_below_labels, labels)
      } else {
        all_above_labels <- c(all_above_labels, labels)
      }
      generic_labels <- c(generic_labels, labels)
    }
  }

  # Render: early-exits, directional sections, specific interpretations, generic
  parts <- early_exits

  if (length(all_above_labels) > 0) {
    parts <- c(parts, render_outlier_section(
      sR$outlier$framing_above_q3, all_above_labels
    ))
  }
  if (length(all_below_labels) > 0) {
    parts <- c(parts, render_outlier_section(
      sR$outlier$framing_below_q1, all_below_labels
    ))
  }

  parts <- c(parts, unique(specific_interpretations))

  # Generic summary last, naming the metrics without specific interpretation
  if (length(generic_labels) > 0) {
    metric_names <- knitr::combine_words(paste0('"', generic_labels, '"'))
    template <- sR$outlier$generic_summary
    if (!is.null(template)) {
      parts <- c(parts, as.character(glue::glue(
        template, metric_names = metric_names,
        .open = "{", .close = "}"
      )))
    }
  }

  parts <- parts[nzchar(parts)]
  if (length(parts) > 0) paste(parts, collapse = "\n\n") else ""
}

# Interpret distribution comparison for figures
interpret_distribution <- function(figure_data, metric_type, sR) {
  if (is.null(figure_data)) {
    return("")
  }

  location_params <- figure_data$location_parameters
  if (is.null(location_params) ||
      nrow(location_params) < 2 ||
      !"ref" %in% location_params$dataset) {
    return("")
  }

  own_data <- location_params[location_params$dataset == "own", ]
  ref_data <- location_params[location_params$dataset == "ref", ]

  if (nrow(own_data) == 0 || nrow(ref_data) == 0) {
    return("")
  }

  text_parts <- character(0)

  # Compare medians (using q2 which is median)
  own_median <- own_data$q2
  ref_median <- ref_data$q2

  # Calculate difference as percentage of reference median
  median_diff_pct <- ((own_median - ref_median) / ref_median) * 100

  # Determine median comparison
  # Threshold for "similar" is 2 for gestational age and 5 for birth weight
  similar_threshold <- if (metric_type == "gestational_age") 2 else 5

  if (abs(median_diff_pct) < similar_threshold) {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_similar_median")
  } else if (own_median < ref_median) {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_lower_median")
  } else {
    template_key <- paste0(metric_type, "_higher_median")
  }

  if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation[[template_key]])) {
    text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation[[template_key]])
  }

  # Compare distribution spread (IQR)
  own_iqr <- own_data$q3 - own_data$q1
  ref_iqr <- ref_data$q3 - ref_data$q1
  iqr_diff_pct <- ((own_iqr - ref_iqr) / ref_iqr) * 100

  # Note distribution width difference if substantial (>20% difference)
  if (abs(iqr_diff_pct) > 20) {
    if (own_iqr < ref_iqr) {
      if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation$narrower_distribution)) {
        text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation$narrower_distribution)
      }
    } else {
      if (!is.null(sR$figure_interpretation$wider_distribution)) {
        text_parts <- c(text_parts, sR$figure_interpretation$wider_distribution)
      }
    }
  }

  # Combine all text parts
  if (length(text_parts) > 0) {
    paste(text_parts, collapse = " ")
  } else {
    ""
  }
}

#' Detect if own and reference data have different World Bank classes (Partner Report)
#' @param own_countries Tibble with own countries (name, wb_class)
#' @param ref_countries Tibble with reference countries (name, wb_class)
#' @param include_wb_class Whether WB class is included ("no", "pseudonymised", "yes")
#' @return List with has_mismatch (logical) and details (character) or NULL
detect_wb_class_mismatch <- function(own_countries, ref_countries, include_wb_class) {
  # ToDo: Refactor to detect availability of World Bank class from data instead of relying
  #       on include_wb_class and look if removing get_localised_world_bank_class_names
  #       makse sense
  # Only detect mismatches when include_wb_class = "yes"
  if (include_wb_class != "yes" ||
      is.null(own_countries) ||
      is.null(ref_countries)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # For character vectors, no WB class info available
  if (is.character(own_countries) || is.character(ref_countries) ||
      !("wb_class" %in% names(own_countries)) ||
      !("wb_class" %in% names(ref_countries))) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Get unique WB classes
  own_classes <- own_countries |>
    dplyr::pull("wb_class") |>
    as.character() |>
    unique() |>
    sort()

  ref_classes <- ref_countries |>
    dplyr::pull("wb_class") |>
    as.character() |>
    unique() |>
    sort()

  # Filter out NA/empty WB classes for comparison purposes
  own_classes_valid <- own_classes[!is.na(own_classes) & nzchar(trimws(own_classes))]
  ref_classes_valid <- ref_classes[!is.na(ref_classes) & nzchar(trimws(ref_classes))]

  # Skip mismatch detection if either side has no valid WB classes
  if (length(own_classes_valid) == 0 || length(ref_classes_valid) == 0) {
    return(list(has_mismatch = FALSE))
  }

  # Check if they differ
  has_mismatch <- !setequal(own_classes_valid, ref_classes_valid)

  if (!has_mismatch) {
    return(list(has_mismatch = FALSE))
  }

  # Get localized display names for the classes
  own_class_names <- get_localised_world_bank_class_names(own_classes_valid) |>
    paste(collapse = ", ")

  ref_class_names <- get_localised_world_bank_class_names(ref_classes_valid) |>
    paste(collapse = ", ")

  return(list(
    has_mismatch = TRUE,
    own_classes = own_class_names,
    ref_classes = ref_class_names
  ))
}

```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
if(is.null(localeObj$territory)){
  locale_gt <- localeObj$language
  locale_stringi <- localeObj$language
} else {
  locale_gt <- paste0(localeObj$language, "-", localeObj$territory)
  locale_stringi <- paste0(localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory)
}
options(`gt.locale` = locale_gt)

sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r General setup and parameter preparation}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$referenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$referenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$referenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$referenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$referenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- NULL
}

typedParams <- list(
  referenceDataFile = params$referenceDataFile,
  unitCodes = params$unitCodes,
  reportingPeriodFrom = if (!is.null(params$reportingPeriodFrom)) as.Date(params$reportingPeriodFrom) else NULL,
  reportingPeriodTo = if (!is.null(params$reportingPeriodTo)) as.Date(params$reportingPeriodTo) else NULL,
  birthWeightFrom = if (!is.null(params$birthWeightFrom)) as.integer(params$birthWeightFrom) else NULL,
  birthWeightTo = if (!is.null(params$birthWeightTo)) as.integer(params$birthWeightTo) else NULL,
  gestationWeeksFrom = if (!is.null(params$gestationWeeksFrom)) as.integer(params$gestationWeeksFrom) else NULL,
  gestationWeeksTo = if (!is.null(params$gestationWeeksTo)) as.integer(params$gestationWeeksTo) else NULL,
  includeNonCorePatients = if (!is.null(params$includeNonCorePatients)) as.logical(params$includeNonCorePatients) else FALSE,
  includeInvalidPatients = get_validation_exceptions(params$validationExceptionFile)
)

if (!is.null(params$partnerDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$partnerDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$partnerDataFile))
  partner_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(params$partnerDataFile,
             file.info(params$partnerDataFile)$size))

  if (inherits(partner_data, "neoipcr_bnch_ds")) {
    if (!is.null(reference_data))
      stop("partnerDataFile already contains benchmark data; referenceDataFile is not applicable.")
    benchmark_data <- partner_data
    # Extract unit codes from the "own" dataset's metadata
    data_unit_codes <- partner_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$department_filter
  } else if (inherits(partner_data, "neoipcr_rep_ds")) {
    benchmark_data <- if (is.null(reference_data)) {
      neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(own = partner_data)
    } else {
      neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(own = partner_data, ref = reference_data)
    }
    # Extract unit codes from the dataset's metadata
    data_unit_codes <- partner_data$metadata$dataset_options$department_filter
  } else {
    stop("partnerDataFile must contain a neoipcr_bnch_ds or neoipcr_rep_ds object.")
  }

  # Override unitCodes from data metadata (more reliable than QMD param in DataFile mode)
  if (!is.null(data_unit_codes) && length(data_unit_codes) > 0) {
    typedParams$unitCodes <- data_unit_codes
  }
} else {
  get_unit_data <- function() suppressWarnings(
    import_dhis2(
      connection_options = get_connection_options(
        scheme = params$dhis2Scheme, hostname = params$dhis2Hostname,
        port = params$dhis2Port, path = params$dhis2Path),
      dataset_options = dhis2_dataset_options(
        department_filter = typedParams$unitCodes,
        surveillance_end_from = typedParams$reportingPeriodFrom,
        surveillance_end_to = typedParams$reportingPeriodTo,
        birth_weight_from = typedParams$birthWeightFrom,
        birth_weight_to = typedParams$birthWeightTo,
        gestational_age_from = typedParams$gestationWeeksFrom,
        gestational_age_to = typedParams$gestationWeeksTo,
        include_ineligible_patients = typedParams$includeNonCorePatients,
        include_invalid_patients = typedParams$includeInvalidPatients,
        include_world_bank_class = "yes",
        include_country = "yes",
        include_hospital = "yes",
        include_department = "yes",
        # For now test data is data from special test departments in DHIS.
        # It does not hurt to include it because we'll typically also have
        # a department filter which will remove these departments again if
        # we're not interested in them
        include_test_data = TRUE
        ))) |>
    neoipcr::calculate_department_data()

  benchmark_data <- if (is.null(reference_data)) {
    neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(
      own = get_unit_data())
  } else {
    neoipcr::get_benchmark_data(
      own = get_unit_data(),
      ref = reference_data)
  }
}

```

```{r Classify metrics}
#| include: false

# Tables needing non-default args for row identification
metric_classify_args <- list(
  usage_density_rate_table = list(identifier_col = "factor"),
  infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table = list(identifier_col = "group"),
  abr_infection_rate_table = list(combine_cols = c("abr", "group")),
  resistance_test_rate_table = list(combine_cols = c("abr", "cond"))
)

# Classify all tables: table_name → named ordered factor (metric_id → state)
metric_registry <- list()
for (tbl_name in names(benchmark_data)) {
  tbl_data <- benchmark_data[[tbl_name]]
  if (!is.data.frame(tbl_data)) next
  args <- metric_classify_args[[tbl_name]] %||% list()
  metric_registry[[tbl_name]] <- do.call(
    classify_metrics,
    c(list(table_data = tbl_data), args)
  )
}
```

```{r Preparing localised data}
#| include: false

# Extract counts from benchmark_data for a given dataset suffix (_own or _ref)
extract_counts <- function(bm, suffix) {
  pull_col <- function(tbl, col) {
    col_name <- paste0(col, suffix)
    if (!is.null(tbl) && col_name %in% names(tbl)) tbl[[col_name]] else NULL
  }
  pull_filtered <- function(tbl, filter_col, filter_val, value_col) {
    col_name <- paste0(value_col, suffix)
    if (!is.null(tbl) && col_name %in% names(tbl)) {
      tbl |> dplyr::filter(.data[[filter_col]] == filter_val) |> dplyr::pull(col_name)
    } else {
      NULL
    }
  }
  list(
    n_departments = pull_col(bm$n_departments, "n"),
    n_patients = pull_col(bm$n_patients, "total"),
    n_enrollments = pull_col(bm$n_enrollments, "total"),
    n_patient_days = pull_col(bm$n_patient_days, "total"),
    n_severe_infections = pull_filtered(
      bm$incidence_density_rate_table, "inf", "si", "n"),
    n_infectious_agents = pull_filtered(
      bm$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table, "group", "Total", "n"),
    n_infections_with_agent = pull_filtered(
      bm$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_inf_type_table, "inf", "all", "n"),
    n_infections_overall = pull_filtered(
      bm$n_infections, "inf_type", "overall", "total")
  )
}

dR <- list(
  own = c(
    list(creationTimestamp = format(
      lubridate::now("UTC"), format = "%x %X", tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE)),
    format_dataset_resources(
      benchmark_data$metadata$own,
      extract_counts(benchmark_data, "_own"), sR)
  ),
  ref = if ("ref" %in% benchmark_data$dataset_names) {
    c(
      list(creationTimestamp = format(
        benchmark_data$metadata$ref$calculated,
        format = "%x %X", tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE)),
      format_dataset_resources(
        benchmark_data$metadata$ref,
        extract_counts(benchmark_data, "_ref"), sR)
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }
)

# Detect metadata differences for highlighting
metadata_diff <- if (!is.null(dR$ref)) {
  list(
    birthweight_differs = (dR$own$birthweightFilter != dR$ref$birthweightFilter),
    gestational_age_differs = (dR$own$gestationalAgeFilter != dR$ref$gestationalAgeFilter),
    countries_differ = (dR$own$countriesList != dR$ref$countriesList)
  )
} else {
  list(
    birthweight_differs = FALSE,
    gestational_age_differs = FALSE,
    countries_differ = FALSE
  )
}

# Detect World Bank class mismatches
wb_class_mismatch <- if (!is.null(dR$ref)) {
  detect_wb_class_mismatch(
    own_countries = benchmark_data$metadata$own$countries,
    ref_countries = benchmark_data$metadata$ref$countries,
    include_wb_class = benchmark_data$metadata$own$dataset_options$include_world_bank_class
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

```

```{r Set up NeoIPC layout}
#| include: false

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

```
